params.name: Red Algae Fossil
params.description:
On Dec 8, 2006 AD, some scientists discovered it - the world's oldest plant fossil.
This seemingly inconspicuous fossil has a history dating back 1.6 billion years. It appears particularly large in comparison to many fine bacteria fossils from the same time period, and its interior is also very orderly, indicating that it was clearly a relatively advanced life form. The discovery of this fossil has altered the scientific community's understanding of the origins of complex life, as well as peo …
